summary_en: 225,000 shares (4.79% of S/O), ¥50M upper limit, open-market purchase, May 15–Jun 30, 2026.
title_en: Notice on Decision of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of treasury stock based on bylaws under Companies Act Article 165(2))
translation_en_brief: Kawase Computer Supplies Co., Ltd. announced a treasury stock acquisition program on 14 May 2026. The board authorized the purchase of up to 225,000 ordinary shares (4.79% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥50 million. The acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange during the period 15 May 2026 to 30 June 2026. The company stated the rationale as executing flexible capital policy in response to changes in the operating environment. As of 14 May 2026, the company held 469,211 treasury shares against 4,690,789 shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock).
